During pregnancy, caloric needs increase to support fetal growth. However, these increases vary based on gestational stage and individual nutritional status. The consensus among nutritionists is that an additional intake of about 300-500 kcal/day may be needed for optimal maternal-fetal health as the pregnancy progresses into second trimester onward.
